items.title: Homicide detectives investigate death of teen outside Melbourne hospital

children.content: A teenage boy stabbed to death outside a medical centre in the city's north last night has been remembered as a loyal and funny friend.

gallery.altText: White roses placed next to a photo frame

thumbnail.altText: White roses placed next to a photo frame

items.title: Teen accused of abducting 17yo with intent to force marriage

children.content: A teen has been accused of abducting a 17-year-old girl from near a Melbourne school with the intention of forcing her to marry him.

image.altText: A blue sleeve with a Victoria Police badge sewn into it, including the motto "Uphold the Right".

items.title: Victorian government to review puppy farm laws amid 'loophole' concerns

children.content: The Victorian government will review animal welfare laws to tighten loopholes being "exploited" by puppy farmers.

image.altText: Georgie posing and smiling with a dog.

items.title: 'At greatest risk of CTE': Expert calls out dangers of heading the ball

children.content: With all eyes on the World Cup, Australian football's management of the risks associated with the practice of heading the ball, such as dementia and CTE, is in the spotlight.

image.altText: A young soccer player about to kick a soccer ball.

items.title: 'Robbing people using visas': Applicants shocked by sudden price hike

children.content: International students and families say they feel shocked and exploited after visa fees across dozens of categories rose on July 1 without warning, with some surging more than 200 per cent.

image.altText: A man wearing glasses and a white chef's uniform is stir-frying at the stove.

items.title: Cats face Lions in blockbuster clash at Kardinia Park

children.content: Geelong and Brisbane meet at Kardinia Park for a spot in the top four, as round 17 of the AFL kicks off under lights. Follow live.

gallery.altText: A Geelong AFL player blows out his cheeks in exertion as he tries to run clear of a diving Brisbane player.

thumbnail.altText: A Geelong AFL player blows out his cheeks in exertion as he tries to run clear of a diving Brisbane player.

items.title: Solomon expects 'tap on shoulder' in Bombers coach race

children.content: James Hird's open ambitions have done little to sway Dean Solomon, with the interim Essendon coach yet to declare his future plans.

image.altText: Dean Solomon during a Bombers AFL match in 2026.

items.title: Exhibition shines light on Australian women without housing

children.content: Women and girls make up 60 per cent of the estimated 289,000 people who seek help across Australia, according to the latest statistics from the Australian Institute of Health and Welfare.

image.altText: A woman gestures while seated opposite another person in a social work setting.

items.title: XPeng electric vehicle owners still chasing $5k cashback months on

children.content: When Mustansir Milky took the leap and bought a new electric vehicle, he didn't expect to have to fight to get the $5,000 cashback payment he was promised.

image.altText: Mustansir Milky stands beside his electric car outside his house

items.title: Two people dead after collision in Victoria's south-west

children.content: Two people have died after a collision near an intersection about 30 kilometres north of Colac, in Victoria's south-west.

image.altText: Victorian police officer from behind

items.title: Traditional owner takes government to court over flood plain project

children.content: A protest camp on the banks of the Murray River enters its sixth week as traditional owners and locals fight a plan to return water to nine flood plains they say will kill trees and wildlife.

gallery.altText: Two women holding protest signs against a floodplain project

thumbnail.altText: Two women holding protest signs against a floodplain project

items.title: Heroin overdose warning after multiple Victorians unknowingly take drug

children.content: One person has died and multiple people have overdosed across Victoria, leading to the discovery of heroin in substances thought to be methamphetamine or cocaine.

image.altText: White power drug, sprinkled on reflective surface, with ziplock plastic bag.

items.title: Liberal Party to meet to determine Moira Deeming's future

children.content: Opposition Leader Jess Wilson says the state executive of the Liberal Party will meet to determine Moira Deeming's candidacy for the November election.

image.altText: A woman with shoulder-length black hair, and wearing a purple jacket, smiles.

items.title: Last-minute NDIS relief for designer featured on Gardening Australia

children.content: Garden designer Joshua Ruff has been given a six-month reprieve by the National Disability Insurance Agency (NDIA) after speaking out about changes to his NDIS plan.

gallery.altText: A man with a bushy beard and orange hat next to a man in a wheelchair with a feeding tube in his nostril

thumbnail.altText: A man with a bushy beard and orange hat next to a man in a wheelchair with a feeding tube in his nostril

items.title: Childcare provider stripped of funding labels decision 'devastating'

children.content: A Victorian childcare provider stripped of its federal government funding over unresolved safety breaches has vowed to challenge the decision.

image.altText: A non-identifiable child playing with toys.

items.title: Former ACM executive Antony Catalano's case adjourned until October

children.content: The former Australian Community Media executive is accused of assaulting his wife at their St Kilda penthouse in March.

image.altText: A side profile shot of Australian Community Media executive chairman Antony Catalano in an outdoor setting.

items.title: Three people evacuated from suspicious blaze on busy Melbourne road

children.content: A fire that engulfed a tobacco shop on Bridge Road in Richmond early this morning is being treated as suspicious.

image.altText: A shop on fire

items.title: Harmful conspiracy sustained anti-Jewish hate online, commission hears

children.content: The royal commission has heard new research which found anti-Jewish hate increased online both after October 7, 2023 and the Bondi Beach terror attack in December.

image.altText: A man's hands typing at a laptop in a dark room.

items.title: With no taxis and limited public transport, town's doctors revert to home visits

children.content: When their local taxi service folded 18 months ago, Beechworth residents struggled to get to their medical appointments.

items.title: Rural disability advocate travelling 440km in wheelchair to raise money

children.content: Sam Longmore is wheeling across the Riverina in the rain to raise money for mental health services.

image.altText: A woman in a wheel chair in front of a hertiage red brick building.

items.title: Housing price downturn accelerates as 'perfect storm' hits market

children.content: Australian home values record their biggest decline in more than three years as the housing market slowdown that began in Sydney and Melbourne spreads across the country.

image.altText: Gregory Hills suburb and houses

items.title: 'Chance to shine' for Australian seafood under new labelling laws

children.content: New labelling laws for hospitality venues serving seafood should help diners know exactly what they are eating.

image.altText: image of imported and australian fish on display in shop

items.title: Usman Khawaja helps launch national Islamophobia awareness campaign

children.content: The retired 39-year-old, who was the first Muslim to play international cricket for Australia, says Islamophobia is on the rise, with women most vulnerable to attacks, because "hate is more prevalent that it has been before".

image.altText: Usman Khawaja raises his bat and helmet in celebration

items.title: Ban extended for 'birth keeper' involved in influencer's freebirth death

children.content: Emily Lal, who previously operated online as The Authentic Birthkeeper, will be banned from advertising, providing advice and health services for another three months while the Victorian health watchdog investigates.

avatar.alt: A woman with blonde hair holding a microphone.

items.title: MP Josh Burns reveals toll of online abuse after office vandalised

children.content: Federal Victorian MP Josh Burns details an attack on his electorate office where a hammer was used to smash the windows, and the following abuse on social media.

image.altText: Joshua Burns in suit and blue tie wearing glasses outside royal commission

items.title: Final report finds Avalon stunt pilot was too low before crash

children.content: A report from the Australian Transport Safety Bureau into a crash at the Avalon Airshow last year will result in changes to how low stunt pilots can fly at the event.

image.altText: An orange plane crashed on the ground

items.title: North-west Victorian sporting league adopts new concussion app

children.content: A sporting league in regional Victoria is the first to adopt a concussion app aimed at improving communication and accountability around concussions at grassroots sports.

image.altText: Players jump for the ball during a game of football

items.title: Regional council boss resigns after very difficult six-year tenure

children.content: During that time, Bradley Thomas has faced a "private prosecution" by a ratepayer and had a cup of coffee thrown at him by a resident.

image.altText: Grey haired white man in checkered shirt and dark blazer, sitting in front of door that says Mayor's room.

items.title: Closure of long-term residential facility run by Salvos sparks concerns

children.content: A long-term residential facility in Melbourne's inner-west will begin the process of shutting down, raising concerns about the future of dozens of vulnerable men.

gallery.altText: Protesters hold signs calling for Foley House to be saved

thumbnail.altText: Protesters hold signs calling for Foley House to be saved

items.title: Sons remember 'loving' mum after Airbnb guest found guilty of killing her

children.content: Maree Vermont's sons say they never thought hosting Airbnb guests would be dangerous for their mother, who was proud of the home she had built.

image.altText: Two men stand in front of a stone house with signs of fire damage.

items.title: This Liberal took his teacher to gambling anonymous

children.content: When Liberal backbencher Simon Kennedy was a teenager, one of his high school teachers asked to borrow money for his gambling addiction. He says he ended up accompanying the teacher to Gamblers Anonymous meetings.

image.altText: Man in light blue shirt sits in from of radio mic and looks into distance. He is wearing headphones.

items.title: ABC presenter Trevor Chappell to hang up mic after 26 years

children.content: After decades of keeping night owls and shift workers company on ABC radio across Australia, Overnights presenter Trevor Chappell decides to call it a day at the age of 65.

image.altText: Overnights presenter Trevor Chappell wears a blue shirt and stands near the arts centre

items.title: Police probe ramraid and suspicious fire in Melbourne's south-east

children.content: Investigators believe unknown offenders rammed a vehicle into a shop in Mentone overnight before a fire gutted the business.

image.altText: A shop gutted by arson

items.title: 'Not all heroes wear capes': Plaque unveiled for man who died trying to save teenager

children.content: The plaque remembers 22-year-old Aidan Becker, who was killed when trying to rescue a 14-year-old boy from an alleged machete attack at Mernda train station in March.

gallery.altText: A photo of Aidan Becker smiling
A brown and bold plaque showing a young boy on the shoulders of a woman
A man with closely shaved hair has his arm around a man in a yellow and brown striped footy top with a medal around his neck.

thumbnail.altText: A photo of Aidan Becker smiling
A brown and bold plaque showing a young boy on the shoulders of a woman
A man with closely shaved hair has his arm around a man in a yellow and brown striped footy top with a medal around his neck.

items.title: Worker says forestry transition program 'decimated' Gippsland's small towns

children.content: The Victorian Forestry Transition Program is ending. In the regions that relied on the timber trade, the question is whether it worked.

image.altText: Image of a small general store, with a petrol bowser out the front on the footpath.
